# CWE-367 safe: Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-367-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

func OpenPatientScan(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("scan")
	if strings.Contains(name, "..") {
		http.Error(w, "invalid path", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return os.ErrInvalid
	}
	target := filepath.Join("/var/scans/inbox", filepath.Base(name))
	data, err := os.ReadFile(target)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.Write(data)
	return nil
}
